channel.title: Profiles on Masaki Kohana
channel.description: Recent content in Profiles on Masaki Kohana

item.title: M.Kohana Profile
item.description:
Basic Info
Name Masaki Kohana
Degree Ph.D.SciTech, Seikei University
E-mail kohana[at]st.seikei.ac.jp
E-mail mkohana[at]acm.org
Address Kichijoji-Kitamachi 3-3-1, Musashino-shi, Tokyo, Japan
Society ACM, IEEE Computer Society, IEICE, IPSJ

Profile

Research Interest

  • Web-based System
  • Parallel and Distributed System
  • Text mining

Publication

Journal and Conference Paper

Skill

  • Golang
  • C++
  • JavaScript
  • Java

Experience

  • Assistant Professor, Dept. of Computer and Information Science, Faculty of Science and Technology, Seikei University, 2013.04-present
  • Part-time Lecture, Dept. of Computer and Information Science, Faculty of Science and Technology, Seikei University, 2012.04-2013.03

Teaching

  • Seikei University
    • Fundamental Programming, 2013-2014
    • Fundamental Programming Experiment, 2012-present
    • Regular Programming Experiment, 2012
    • Advanced Programming, 2013-present
    • Advanced Programming Experiment, 2013-present
    • Java Programming, 2013-2015
    • Java Programming Experiment, 2013-2015

Education

  • Ph.D.SciTech, Seikei Univeristy, 2013.03
  • M.Eng, Seikei University, 2010.03
  • B.Eng, Seikei University, 2008.03

Award

  • Best Paper Award, The 18th International Conference on Network-Based Information Systems (NBiS2015) Workshop, 2015.09

Activity

  • International Workshop on Web Services and Social Media
    • Co-Chair, 2015-2016
    • Program Committee Member, 2013-2014
  • The 17th International Conference on Network-Based Information Systems (NBiS2014) Program Committee Member
  • IEICE ISS Cyberworlds (Type-2 Technical Group), Secretary, 2014-present
  • Special Section on Cyberworlds, IEICE Transactions on Information & Systems, Editing Secretary, 2016
